sourceFiles: project-root pasted Sonic Sphere Fey system note

easySchematicLibraryMatches.label: TASCAM ML-32D
easySchematicLibraryMatches.notes: No bundled TASCAM ML-32D template found. Reviewed Focusrite RedNet A16R as a similar Dante DB25 interface, but it is 16x16 and not a valid model substitute.

easySchematicLibraryMatches.label: Dayton Audio MA1240a
easySchematicLibraryMatches.notes: No bundled Dayton MA1240a template found; keep custom 12-channel RCA-to-speaker template.

easySchematicLibraryMatches.label: Dayton Audio MA1260
easySchematicLibraryMatches.notes: No bundled Dayton MA1260 template found; keep custom 12-channel RCA-to-speaker template.

easySchematicLibraryMatches.label: Focal 100 OD8
easySchematicLibraryMatches.notes: No bundled Focal 100 OD8 template found; keep confirmed custom speaker template.

easySchematicLibraryMatches.label: Devine Onyx 18SXA
easySchematicLibraryMatches.notes: No bundled Devine Onyx 18SXA powered subwoofer template found.

easySchematicLibraryMatches.label: Devine DI-003
easySchematicLibraryMatches.notes: No bundled Devine DI-003 or generic DI-box template found in the checked source files.

easySchematicLibraryMatches.label: Dante AVIO Bluetooth ADP-BT-AU-2X1
easySchematicLibraryMatches.notes: Bundled Audinate AVIO templates exist for analog input, analog output, and USB, but not Bluetooth. Do not substitute them as exact matches.

easySchematicLibraryMatches.label: MacBook Air M2 (2022)
easySchematicLibraryMatches.notes: Bundled generic Computer template exists, but not MacBook Air M2. Keep custom Apple model and DVS software port.

easySchematicLibraryMatches.label: USB-C Multiport Adapter
easySchematicLibraryMatches.notes: No bundled USB-C multiport Ethernet adapter template found.

easySchematicLibraryMatches.label: TP-Link 5-Port Ethernet Switch (model TBD)
easySchematicLibraryMatches.notes: Bundled generic 8-port switch is closest available; exact TP-Link 5-port model remains trace-required.

easySchematicLibraryMatches.label: TP-Link POE150S / TL-POE150S
easySchematicLibraryMatches.notes: No bundled TP-Link POE150S injector template found.

easySchematicLibraryMatches.label: Ubiquiti GP-H240-125G PoE Injector
easySchematicLibraryMatches.notes: No bundled Ubiquiti GP-H240-125G injector template found.

easySchematicLibraryMatches.label: Ubiquiti EdgePoint R6
easySchematicLibraryMatches.notes: No bundled Ubiquiti EdgePoint R6 template found.

easySchematicLibraryMatches.label: DB25 to RCA Fanout (8 ch)
easySchematicLibraryMatches.notes: Bundled DB25 break-out is XLR-based; our confirmed signal path needs RCA fanouts, so keep custom RCA connector template.

easySchematicLibraryMatches.label: DB25 to XLR Fanout Candidate (8 ch)
easySchematicLibraryMatches.notes: Bundled DB25 8-channel break-out topology matches the candidate DB25-to-XLR output direction; exact cable model/direction remains unresolved.

unresolvedItems.verification: Exact manufacturer/model unknown; read adapter label or purchase record.

Exact manufacturer/model and balanced-to-unbalanced wiring need cable-label verification.

unresolvedItems.item: DB25 to XLR Fanout Candidate (8 ch)
unresolvedItems.verification: DTM/DTF direction and connected ML-32D input/output side remain unresolved.
